hero.name: Md. Khairul Kabir
hero.bio: Principal Software Engineer with 9+ years of expertise in .NET, React, and micro-frontend architecture — building scalable, high-performance systems across banking, healthcare, and enterprise domains.

about.heading: Principal Software Engineer based in Dhaka, Bangladesh
paragraphs: I am Md. Khairul Kabir, a seasoned Software Engineer with over 9 years of experience building scalable, high-performance software solutions across diverse domains. I specialize in modern web architecture — particularly micro-frontend (MFE) design using React and Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) and microservices development with .NET.

Over the years I have evolved into a technical leader, guiding both frontend and backend teams, designing system architectures, and ensuring the delivery of robust, maintainable, and secure applications. I am well-versed in Agile/Scrum practices and have a strong focus on DevOps, implementing CI/CD pipelines to enable faster, reliable releases.

skills.title: Backend Development
skills.description: Building robust APIs, microservices, and BFF layers with enterprise-grade .NET architecture.

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.description: Crafting scalable micro-frontend (MFE) architectures and responsive UIs with modern frameworks.

skills.title: Database & Data
skills.description: Expert in database design, optimization, and management across SQL and cloud platforms.

skills.title: DevOps & Cloud
skills.description: Implementing CI/CD pipelines and containerised deployments for faster, reliable releases.

skills.title: Architecture & Design
skills.description: Designing systems that scale with proven patterns, clean code, and security in mind.

skills.title: Leadership & Agile
skills.description: Technical leader driving sprint planning, delivery management, mentoring, and code quality.

experience.description: Leading the One App platform that unifies the bank's digital channels — accelerating feature delivery, lifting customer engagement, and turning fragmented experiences into one trusted product the business can grow on.
Modernised internal applications powering day-to-day banking operations — cutting manual workload, sharpening reporting cycles, and giving decision-makers cleaner data to act on faster.
Delivered marketing and management platforms for global brands — helping campaigns launch faster, scale across markets, and convert at higher rates through better digital tooling.

Shipped customer-facing banking products — debit cards, bill pay, loan tracking, FDRs, and a stock trading platform — that opened new revenue streams and removed friction from everyday banking journeys.
Built the EHR SaaS that brought clinics across Bangladesh online — improving patient outcomes, unlocking recurring subscription revenue, and laying the digital foundation for the company's growth.
Helped deliver BankUltimus, a mobile banking product that expanded customer reach for partner banks and modernised their digital channels in a fast-changing market.

projects.title: Islamic Prayer Times App
projects.description: A comprehensive prayer times web application for Bangladesh. Features real-time GPS geolocation, support for all 64 districts, countdown timer to next prayer, Jummah time display, Hijri calendar with Bangladesh adjustment, and live weather integration.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive electronic health record and hospital management platform built during 3 years at Niramoy. Covered patient registration, appointment scheduling, prescription management, billing, and lab reports — serving multiple clinics across Bangladesh.

projects.title: MarTech Enterprise Platform
projects.description: Developed and maintained enterprise marketing technology solutions at Wunderman Thompson for global clients. Implemented backend APIs and Angular frontends supporting large-scale campaign management, analytics dashboards, and content delivery pipelines.

testimonials.text: Khairul's diligence and commitment to excellence are exemplary. His in-depth knowledge of .NET and Frontend technologies played a pivotal role in our team's success, demonstrating both versatility and expertise. His strong sense of task ownership, coupled with a proactive approach, made him a reliable go-to person. Khairul Kabir is an asset to any software engineering team.
testimonials.author: Raqif Bassam

testimonials.text: I had the pleasure of working with Khairul as their team lead and product owner. Khairul is an outstanding developer — sincere, committed and structured. His hardworking and collaborative nature makes him an exceptional team player. If our paths ever crossed I'd love to work with him again.
testimonials.author: Nazia Hasin

testimonials.text: Khairul Kabir was very energetic & full of great ideas. He is definitely hard working, focused and dedicated. His drive and sincerity towards product development is undeniable. Khairul can deliver in the shortest time constraint while keeping decent code quality. It was an absolute honor to work with him.
testimonials.author: Khaled Md Tuhidul Hossain

testimonials.text: Khairul is an impeccable team player who embraces challenges and never misses an opportunity to exceed expectations. His positive attitude towards work is contagious and lifts the whole team up. He is a gem of a developer who possesses systems thinking, making him a fine addition to any development team.
testimonials.author: Nasrul Karim Sarker, PMP

testimonials.text: Khairul Kabir has extensive knowledge in software engineering — he is the person you go to when you need help. He distinguished himself by consistently developing exceptionally well-engineered software modules. A very dedicated and detail-oriented individual, he thrives on the passion he has for software engineering and solution development.
testimonials.author: Sadequzzaman Monoj

contact.intro: Whether you have an opportunity, a project to discuss, or just want to connect — I'm always open to new conversations and collaborations.
